top_signals.title: Supreme Court rejects Florida lawsuit over immigrant truck driver CDLs
top_signals.summary:
The U.S. Supreme Court rejected Florida’s effort to sue California and Washington over commercial driver licenses issued to undocumented immigrants.

The post Supreme Court rejects Florida lawsuit over immigrant truck driver CDLs  appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Barriers grow for international students seeking U.S. jobs: The 'American dream ... is collapsing'
top_signals.summary: International graduates say a weak hiring market and changing immigration rules make it harder for them to achieve their American dream of working in the U.S.

top_signals.title: First Phosphate update expands EV battery ingredient fourfold in Quebec
top_signals.summary: The update outlines 6.2 million measured pit-constrained tonnes grading 7.7% phosphate and 198.5 million indicated tonnes at 6%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Global Fuel Supply becomes Blue Energy Partners
top_signals.summary: Today, Global Fuel Supply is changing its name to Blue Energy Partners. What started as a fuel trader has grown into a broader energy solution business, covering physical supply, marine energy trading, alternative fuels and environmental solutions. The name change reflects how the company has grown across geographies and product lines since it was founded ...
